title: helleborine trinervia
intro: Helleborine trinervia, also known as the green helleborine, is a type of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of helleborine trinervia include its ability to help reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of helleborine trinervia include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
